programs.title: Air Rescue
programs.desc: Fly with the pilots and intensive care paramedics of The Westpac Lifesaver Rescue Helicopter Service who provide emergency medical treatment and assistance to those in life-threatening situations.

programs.title: Born And Missing
programs.desc: (2017) Baby-napping thriller with Kaitlyn Black. After his wife dies in a car crash and their newborn disappears, Brian comes to a shocking realisation - that someone they know would kill for a baby..

programs.title: Dating to Kill
programs.desc: (2019) Cradle-robbing thriller with Clare Kramer. Jessica is shocked when her daughter starts dating an older man. But that soon turns to terror when she discovers her lethal connection to him...

programs.title: The Threat Next Door
programs.desc: When an overworked single mother hires a friendly neighbour to babysit her daughter, she begins to face increasingly strange and threatening situations. Starring Shiva Negar (2023)

programs.title: Abducted
programs.desc: (2006) Captivating drama with Sarah Wynter. The lonely wife of a prison warden falls for an inmate she believes is innocent and helps him escape, only to make a shocking discovery about his motives.

programs.title: Cruel Fixation
programs.desc: (2019) Tense thriller starring Kristina Klebe. A recently widowed woman grows suspicious of her insular son's new friend. Could his seemingly strange obsession with her turn sinister?
